title: Document Implement TUI Focus, Detail Scroll, And Mouse Behavior

handoff_summary.completed: Clarified README operator guidance for panel focus, detail scroll reset on selection change, and mouse click/wheel routing. Updated the linked TUI spec to reflect that list clicks also focus the list, detail clicks do not change selection, and selecting a new bead resets detail scroll.
handoff_summary.remaining: No documentation changes remain within this bead's scope.
handoff_summary.risks: Docs now match the current implementation in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py`; downstream runtime changes to panel layout, row hit-testing, or mouse routing will need the README and spec updated together to avoid drift.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: If downstream changes alter list/detail panel chrome, visible-row hit testing, scroll reset behavior, or mouse-wheel routing in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py`, these docs will drift unless README and the TUI spec are updated in the same change.

conflict_risks: If downstream changes alter list/detail panel chrome, visible-row hit testing, scroll reset behavior, or mouse-wheel routing in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py`, these docs will drift unless README and the TUI spec are updated in the same change.

execution_history.summary: Updated TUI documentation to match the implemented panel focus, detail scrolling reset, and mouse interaction behavior.

guardrails.template_text:
# Documentation Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Update documentation and examples that explain the assigned behavior without changing runtime feature behavior.

Allowed actions:
- Edit docs, examples, and explanatory text tied to the assigned bead.
- Align documentation with existing code and validated behavior.
- Identify when implementation or tests must land first and block with a handoff.

Disallowed actions:
- Change runtime behavior, production code paths, or feature logic.
- Invent undocumented behavior that is not present in the codebase.
- Approve code quality or test completeness as a substitute for review.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise documentation changes and remaining gaps.
- Accurate updated docs and clear next-agent recommendations when code changes are required first.

worker_prompt_context.title: Document Implement TUI Focus, Detail Scroll, And Mouse Behavior
worker_prompt_context.conflict_risks: Downstream changes that alter the list/detail panel headers, ids, or layout sizing can break `_list_index_from_y`, viewport height calculations, or mouse routing unless those helpers are updated together.
